comparable_company_analysis.note: SPCX at $201.80 with 130x P/S vs all comps

valuation_score.methodology: P/S vs comps, growth justification, analyst target comparison
evidence: 130x P/S vs TSLA 8x, AMZN 4x, NVDA 35x - extreme premium
Current price $201.80 above ALL analyst targets (avg $164)
Morningstar fair value ~$780B vs market cap $2.8T - 72% discount
No profitability (negative EPS), speculative growth story

No major liquidity concerns

Options activity high - hedging/speculation present
